questions.prompt: Why is regular physical activity especially important for older adults?
options: It helps maintain strength, balance, and independence
It replaces the need for medical care
It is only useful for people under 65
It should be avoided if you have any health condition

questions.prompt: Which is a safe starting point for many older adults?
options: Short walks or gentle movement most days
Lifting maximum weight on day one

questions.prompt: Good nutrition for older adults generally includes:
options: A variety of nutrient-rich foods and enough fluids
Large sugary snacks instead of meals

questions.prompt: Before starting a new exercise program, you should:
options: Talk with your health care provider if you have chronic conditions
Wait until you feel pain to begin
Copy a professional athlete's routine exactly

questions.prompt: Balance exercises can help reduce the risk of:
Osteoporosis is best described as:
options: Weakened bones that are more likely to fracture
A form of diabetes only affecting children

questions.prompt: To support bone health, older adults are often advised to get enough:
Diabetes in older adults may require:
options: Monitoring blood sugar and following a care plan

questions.prompt: If you notice new or worsening symptoms, you should:
options: Wait several years to mention it
Assume it is always normal aging with no follow-up

questions.prompt: Managing chronic conditions often works best when you:
options: Follow your care plan and keep regular appointments
Change medicines on your own weekly
Stop treatments once you feel slightly better

questions.prompt: Mental health in later life is important because:
options: Emotional wellbeing affects daily life and overall health

questions.prompt: Signs that may warrant talking to a professional include:
options: Persistent sadness, anxiety, or loss of interest in activities
Enjoying a hobby once a week

questions.prompt: Staying socially connected can help by:
If you are worried about your mental health, a good first step is:
options: Reach out to a trusted person or health care provider

questions.prompt: As we age, nutrition helps by:
A balanced plate for older adults often includes:
options: Vegetables, fruits, whole grains, and lean protein

questions.prompt: Wellness across the lifespan means:
options: Healthy habits can benefit you at any age
Only young people should eat vegetables

questions.prompt: Dehydration in older adults can:
options: Cause confusion, fatigue, or other health problems

questions.prompt: Changes in taste or smell with age may lead to:
options: Needing more flavor variety or smaller frequent meals

questions.prompt: Fiber in the diet helps with:
Protein is important for older adults because it supports:
If chewing is difficult, helpful strategies include:
options: Soft foods, smoothies, or dental evaluation

questions.prompt: Digital health tools can help you:
options: Track appointments, medications, or wellness goals

questions.prompt: A strong password should:
options: Be unique and hard to guess
Be your birth date posted online
Be shared with family on social media

questions.prompt: Phishing emails often try to:
options: Trick you into revealing personal information

questions.prompt: Before using a new health app, you should:
options: Check privacy settings and use trusted sources
Enter your bank PIN in any pop-up
Share login details with support callers

questions.prompt: Trustworthy health websites often:
options: Cite sources and are run by recognized health organizations
Promise secret cures with no evidence
Ask for payment before showing any information

questions.prompt: When reading medical research summaries, look for:
options: Who conducted the study and how many people were included
Claims that one food cures all diseases

questions.prompt: Health literacy means:
options: Finding, understanding, and using health information

questions.prompt: If online advice conflicts with your doctor's guidance:
options: Discuss it with your health care provider
Stop all treatments immediately on your own
Assume the website is always right
Share passwords to get a second opinion online

questions.prompt: MedlinePlus and similar government health sites are useful because they:
options: Provide evidence-based information for the public
Require sharing your social security number to read articles

questions.prompt: Ageing is best understood as:
options: A lifelong process shaped by biology, society, and experience
Identical for every person in every culture

questions.prompt: Stereotypes about older people can:
options: Lead to unfair assumptions and reduced opportunities

questions.prompt: Ageing in society involves:
options: How communities support participation and dignity

questions.prompt: Lifelong learning in later life can:
Gentle exercise for beginners should:
Building healthy habits works best when you:
options: Set small realistic goals and track progress

questions.prompt: After this workshop module, a good next step is:
options: Stop all activity for a month
